meaning: n.拥有,占有,所有,着迷,领土,领地,财产(常用复数),自制
examples: The car had been his proudest possession.
This ring is my most treasured possession.
He was also charged with illegal possession of firearms.
But this time around, del Bosque utilized the possession game in a different way.
Through an executive order, President Roosevelt made the possession of monetary gold a crime in 1933.
